The calculator checks a claim only when it can ground it; 'not checked' means outside its current coverage, not wrong.
Reading a speaker's move is interpretive. The model proposes the reading; only the claim verdicts are computed.
One automated read of one transcript — a starting point for your own reading, not a verdict on the discussion.
